creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
After https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&sortby=date&revision=559045 got error:
    [javac] /tmp/work/usr/ports/lang/bsh/work/beanshell-2.1.0/src/bsh/util/AWTConsole.java:217: error: cannot find symbol
    [javac]             ((java.awt.peer.TextComponentPeer)getPeer()).setCaretPosition( 
    [javac]                                               ^
    [javac]   symbol:   method getPeer()
    [javac]   location: class AWTConsole
